meta.title: Hermes 2.0 Candidate Layers Catalog
meta.purpose: Wide menu of possible Hermes layers for owner to filter. Buffet not plan.
meta.context: Caio solo founder Cuiaba Brazil. HERMES(find+qualify locals)->GERONIMO(40+ agents make companies 24/7 agentic)->VUECRA(auto-builds sites). Goal: max businesses agentic, lead Brazil agentic market 2026-2027. Constraints: $0-first, self-hosted Contabo, 24/7 self-improving. Signature: gap-reverse-filter.

layers.name: CNPJ Firmographic Foundation
layers.what: Ingest full Brazilian company registry per region via BrasilAPI(primary)+ReceitaWS(fallback): CNAE codes, status, opening date, partners(QSA), address, phone, email, capital. Geocode to Cuiaba neighborhoods.
layers.value: Defines TOTAL addressable set of MT businesses by niche = denominator for penetration%, TAM, conquest. Opening-date deltas catch greenfield CNPJs before competitors.
layers.reuse: Free no-account public APIs. Pairs with existing prospect DB schema.

layers.name: Digital/Agentic Gap-Depth Scanner
layers.what: Per-business scan of what is MISSING vs agentic baseline: no website, outdated CMS, no booking, no chatbot/WhatsApp-API, no analytics, no email capture, phone-only, slow site. Outputs missing-service vector mapped 1:1 to GERONIMO/VUECRA SKUs. Re-scans.
layers.value: Caio signature operationalized. Converts output from 'a prospect' to 'prospect + exact thing to sell + why'. Highest direct ROI to agentic goal.
layers.reuse: Wappalyzer-style OSS fingerprinting ($0, ~90% coverage). Extends existing crawl. Places data in pipeline.

layers.name: Review-Velocity & Sentiment Watcher (GBP)
layers.what: Poll GBP listing; track review count delta, velocity, star trend, owner reply-rate. Flag positive spike(growing/overwhelmed), negative cluster(reputation pain), growing+no-replies(sell auto-review agent).
layers.value: THE primary local-SMB intent signal. Growth+zero-replies = textbook gap-reverse hit. Catches businesses when most likely to say yes.
layers.reuse: GBP/Maps already core data source. Add dated-snapshot diff loop + review_snapshots table.

layers.name: Hiring-Surge Detector
layers.what: Watch 'now hiring' on BR job boards (Catho, Indeed BR, Vagas, Gupy) + business social/GBP posts. Role reveals pain.
layers.value: Top-tier free buying signal, proves budget moving now. Hiring+new-leader = 3x meeting acceptance in 90d window.
layers.reuse: Pure scraping of public BR boards + channels Hermes monitors.

layers.name: New-Location / Expansion Sentinel
layers.what: Detect new unit/branch: new GBP listing same brand, hours/address changes, Cuiaba prefeitura alvara filings, nova-unidade posts.
layers.value: Expansion = capital + need to standardize ops across sites = ideal GERONIMO pitch (one agentic layer serving N locations).
layers.reuse: GBP diffing (needed for review layer) + Cuiaba open-data scraper. Geo-scoped.

layers.name: Ad-Activity / Spend-Change Monitor
layers.what: Check Meta Ad Library + Google Ads transparency: running ads? just started/ramped? Ads + no booking/landing/chat = leaking clicks = gap.
layers.value: Reveals businesses that already decided to invest in growth (budget confirmed) + 'spending money wrong' pitch.
layers.reuse: Meta Ad Library fully public/scriptable. New monitor into signal store.

layers.name: Ownership / Leadership-Change Detector
layers.what: Detect new owner/manager: LinkedIn role changes, GBP under-new-management, Junta Comercial updates, local news.
layers.value: New owner = clean slate + active vendor evaluation = 10x more likely to adopt, 90-120d window. Rare for SMB but high-conversion; cheap passive watch.
layers.reuse: Mostly LinkedIn + GBP diffing Hermes infra touches. Passive flag.

layers.name: Niche x Region Opportunity Heatmap
layers.what: Per CNAE-niche x neighborhood cell: (density x demand x dispersity)/competitive saturation. Render heatmap; flag Blue Ocean cells (high demand, low competition).
layers.value: Answers where is biggest agentic opportunity in Cuiaba. Aim at high-density under-served pockets; avoid crowded zones.
layers.reuse: Rides existing dashboard (F.2.4 tokens; MapLibre+deck.gl H3HexagonLayer, $0). Sits on CNPJ+saturation; mostly aggregation.

layers.name: Competitive-Saturation & Category-Dispersity Layer
layers.what: Per niche x region competitor count + concentration. Separate saturated (avoid) from fragmented under-served (easy entry).
layers.value: Refines heatmap from raw density to true opportunity; flags defensible first-agentic niches.
layers.reuse: Pure derivation from CNPJ+OSM counts already collected.

layers.name: Penetration & Whitespace Conquest Map
layers.what: Track per niche x region fraction of addressable CNPJ set already-agentic/in-pipeline/virgin, overlaid on heatmap.
layers.value: Converts abstract 'lead Brazil 2026-2027' into measurable conquest %. Reuses Geronimo conversion-state joined on CNPJ denominator.
layers.reuse: Sits on CNPJ denominator + scored DB; needs Geronimo conversion-state join.

layers.name: Territory Coverage Engine (H3 hex + frontier sweep)
layers.what: Tile Cuiaba->MT->Brazil into Uber-H3 hexes, each lifecycle unexplored->in_progress->swept->re-sweep-due (TTL decay). Swept = discovery-completeness (Overpass count vs found) not visitation. Boustrophedon daemon sweeps outward, 100% eventual coverage no backtracking.
layers.value: Turns 'city to country' into literal 24/7 algorithm. The map of found/swept/unexplored Caio asked for.
layers.reuse: All $0 self-hostable (h3-py/h3-js, PostGIS, MapLibre+deck.gl, Overpass). Decay mirrors agentmemory.

layers.name: Living Scored Database / Continuous Re-Score
layers.what: Score entire Cuiaba market vs closed-won patterns from Geronimo/Vuecra wins; assign propensity tiers; re-score continuously as state changes (new biz, adds site, hires, fires staff).
layers.value: Hermes always works highest-propensity untouched accounts. Model learns which gaps sell in Cuiaba = compounding lead. Matches 24/7 constraint.
layers.reuse: Feedback loop reuses Geronimo close data + agentmemory self-improve cron. Re-runs gap scanner on Contabo scheduler.

layers.name: External Signal Harvester (cold readiness fingerprint)
layers.what: Score automation maturity from outside-only signals, zero target cooperation: site present+responsive, booking, chatbot, WhatsApp Business, contact-form vs phone-only, social cadence, reviews+reply-rate+latency, tech fingerprint, 24/7-reachable. Emits 0-100 score.
layers.value: THE engine turning Hermes from finder into perfect diagnostic tool. Detects exact missing surface, hands GERONIMO a pre-diagnosed lead.
layers.reuse: Extends existing crawl with signal-extraction pass. Wappalyzer-style OSS. $0 on Contabo.

layers.name: Per-Process Automatability Map
layers.what: Decompose target into 5 canonical processes (attendance, sales, post-sale, scheduling, billing); score automatability=f(volume,repetitiveness,structured-data,decision-criteria,revenue-leak). Per process: state, score, ROI, recommended Geronimo agent. Pre-rank by sellable ROI.
layers.value: Answers which processes can become agentic + how much. Turns 'is behind' into line-item shopping list; 40+ agents self-route. Only 21% enterprises AI-ready, <1% score>50/100 = vast gap.
layers.reuse: Maps 1:1 onto Geronimo 40+ agent catalog. ROI benchmarks hardcoded as priors.

layers.name: Gap-Reverse-Filter Scorer
layers.what: Invert readiness: rank by SIZE-OF-GAP on a sellable process not by readiness. Critical-bottleneck rule: strong overall but scores 1 on one pillar = prime. Filter has-revenue AND has-presence AND missing>=1 high-ROI process. Output sell-queue + reason + deal value + SKU.
layers.value: Caio signature as final ranker. What makes Hermes 'beyond finding prospects' = ranked, reasoned, product-matched target list.
layers.reuse: Pure scoring over Harvester+Automatability. No new data. Slots into existing qualification stage.

layers.name: 5-Stage Maturity Ladder + Composite Readiness Score
layers.what: Roll signals+process map into one stage (Stage1 Manual->Stage5 Autonomous) + numeric composite. Defines agentic-ready threshold; computes % processes with automatability>=70.
layers.value: Headline metric Caio asked for (how much can become agentic) + market leaderboard. Stage label drives GERONIMO playbook.
layers.reuse: Pure aggregation over Harvester+Automatability+Gap-Filter. No new collection.

layers.name: Composite Signal Scorer + Decay Engine
layers.what: Central service: every layer writes dated events to one store. Scorer=sum(strength x fit_weight) with time-decay (15-20%/week, auto-expire) MULTIPLIED by gap-fit. On threshold-cross in active window emit qualified trigger to GERONIMO with SKU+evidence+timing. Logs closes, re-weights.
layers.value: Without it cheap monitors are noise. Stacking 2-3 signals jumps reply 1-5%->25-45%. Decay fires inside 7-60d window (first responder wins 35-50%). Fit-multiplier hard-wires gap-reverse-filter. Win-rate loop = self-improving moat.
layers.reuse: Builds on prospect DB + agentmemory decay. Cheap math, no ML initially. Dated-event store replaces static is_prospect flag.

layers.name: Signal-to-SKU Router
layers.what: Deterministic map: no website->VUECRA; no booking/chatbot/24-7->GERONIMO agent; ad spend+leaky funnel->VUECRA landing+agent; reviews growing+no replies->review-response agent. Emits SKU+pitch angle automatically.
layers.value: Signal-to-product is deterministic here, exploit it. GERONIMO outreach starts already-personalized (15-25% reply vs 3-5% cold).
layers.reuse: Pure rules over gap-scanner output. No new data.

layers.name: Productized Offer Ladder / Auto-Proposal
layers.what: Codified tiered offers (audit->starter site/automation->full transformation->managed retainer) with hybrid pricing (base 40-60% + outcome incentive). Auto-assembles scoped proposal+price from gap report per prospect+vertical.
layers.value: Standardized offers make delivery repeatable; 3rd client = half time of 1st. Auto-proposal collapses pitch->close, key for converting MAX businesses solo.
layers.reuse: Gap Report + Automatability output feeds proposal. Mostly templating + pricing logic.

layers.name: Versioned Automation/Agent Template Library
layers.what: Governed versioned catalog of reusable agent bundles, workflows, prompts, tools that Geronimo clones per client. Each = productized transformation. Every win auto-promotes.
layers.value: #1 solo-founder scaling lever: Nth client costs near-zero. Without it headcount scales with clients, solo leadership impossible.
layers.reuse: n8n self-host (7000+ free workflows) + Agent SDK skills. Generalizes hermes-skill-forge-runner into cross-ecosystem registry.

layers.name: Gap Report / Audit-as-Offer Engine
layers.what: Auto-generate per-prospect evidence report proving the gap (AI-search invisibility, missing/weak site, no booking/chat, no automation, inconsistent NAP, outdated tech). One artifact = cold hook + pitch + machine-readable delivery spec.
layers.value: Highest-leverage layer in catalog. Turns claim into PROOF (highest-converting AAA pitch). Same spine flows find->prove->pitch->deliver, zero handoff loss. Rides 88%-no-AI-strategy / 1.2%-recommended / 45%-consumers-use-AI gap.
layers.reuse: Hermes already finds+qualifies+computes missing-service signal. Gap scanners feed it. Insites/Origami blueprints. Local Ollama narrative, $0.

layers.name: Gap-to-Spec Audit Engine (delivery-side)
layers.what: Deeper post-qualification audit converting MISSING services into a prioritized GERONIMO build-spec: which agents, ROI, effort, tier. Output = machine-readable roadmap + client-facing audit.
layers.value: Lets one founder scope at scale. Same what-is-missing engine becomes auto-scoping telling Geronimo exactly what to build.
layers.reuse: Extends Gap Report + Automatability map. Planner->Generator->Evaluator (Agent SDK) directly buildable.

layers.name: Live Demo Generator
layers.what: For high-fit prospect auto-spin a throwaway demo of the fix (sample VUECRA landing, working WhatsApp triage agent answering as their business) attached to the gap report.
layers.value: Show-dont-tell: a working demo of THEIR automation converts far above a deck. Strongest proof.
layers.reuse: Vuecra already auto-builds sites; needs sandboxed per-demo trigger + teardown TTL.

layers.name: Onboarding Automation (Hermes->Geronimo->Vuecra handoff)
layers.what: On deal-won: collect assets/access, validate vs checklist, spin up isolated workspace, route gap-spec to Geronimo agents / trigger Vuecra build, send SLA-risk reminders.
layers.value: Onboarding gaps cause 40% of at-risk churn in first 90d. Automating handoff makes ecosystem flow end-to-end, lets one founder absorb many simultaneous clients.
layers.reuse: Lifecycle state machine + template library + shared skills provide rails. Vuecra needs only trigger contract.

layers.name: Pipeline/CRM + Lifecycle State Machine
layers.what: Unified record per business: found->qualified->gap-audited->pitched->won->onboarding->delivering->live/retained->at-risk. One source of truth, auto-handoffs between Hermes/Geronimo/Vuecra, stage SLAs, auto-routing.
layers.value: What CONVERTS found-businesses into RETAINED agentic companies = stated goal. SLA flags close onboarding gaps causing 40% churn.
layers.reuse: Hermes already tracks prospects/sequences/replies/deals (cobaia-status). Extend into full-lifecycle CRM.

layers.name: Multi-Tenant Provisioning & Isolation
layers.what: One-command provisioning clones template bundle into isolated per-client tenant on Contabo (own namespace/DB schema/credentials/runtime); Hermes as master control plane; each client isolated access.
layers.value: Required to run MANY transformations on one $0 box without cross-client leakage. Operational backbone for volume; architect early.
layers.reuse: Docker-per-client (agentbot OSS), Postgres schema-per-tenant, n8n multi-instance. All self-hostable.

layers.name: Self-Hosted Orchestration + Observability (Agent-Ops)
layers.what: Run-and-watch: orchestrate each client agents (scheduling, state, retries, recovery) + observability (traces, latency, cost, error rates, guardrail checks) with alerts on break.
layers.value: 24/7 self-improving requires knowing when client agents fail and auto-recovering before client notices. Per-tenant traces feed self-improvement loop. Silent break = churn.
layers.reuse: Langfuse OSS + OpenTelemetry, self-hostable on Contabo. No lock-in.

layers.name: Shared Skills/Capabilities Layer
layers.what: Centralized typed-skill library (sendEmail, generateImage, searchMaps, runWorkflow, scrapeSite, draftSequence, buildPage) all agents pull from. Single-point updates propagate to every agent.
layers.value: With 40+ agents duplicated integrations = unmaintainable. Change once, every agent benefits = maintainability keystone for large self-improving fleet run by one person.
layers.reuse: Stack already thinks in skills (forge-sdk runner, hermes-skill-forge-runner). Generalize into cross-ecosystem registry.

layers.name: Client ROI Proof Layer + QBR Generator
layers.what: Per-client dashboard quantifying delivered value (leads, hours saved, replies handled, revenue influenced, AI-visibility before/after) + auto-QBR narratives. Agent pulls metrics via read-only MCP, drafts, renders before/after, ~20min human approval gate.
layers.value: 2026 is ROI era, proof before wallets reopen (47% higher 90d retention). Retention = profit engine (maintenance retainer near-pure margin). Closes deliver->prove->upsell; shows transformation not activity.
layers.reuse: Hermes computes channel hit-rates/pipeline metrics (cobaia-status), repoint to per-client value. Agent SDK 5-stage pipeline documented.

layers.name: At-Risk Flagging + Upsell Trigger
layers.what: Watch live tenants for drop signals (usage decline, errors, lower ROI trend) and growth signals (new location, hiring, capacity strain) -> fire retention alert or upsell-next-tier trigger.
layers.value: Proactive retention beats firefighting; upsell into existing accounts is cheapest growth. Makes lifecycle CRM an active account-management brain.
layers.reuse: Reuses lifecycle CRM stages + Stage-1 signal watchers (now pointed at clients).

layers.name: Continuous Re-Score Loop
layers.what: Re-run readiness fingerprint + gap scan 24/7 so scores drift with reality (adds booking->drops off scheduling-gap queue; goes quiet->fresh attendance-gap). Feed deal-outcomes back to re-weight ROI priors.
layers.value: Matches 24/7 constraint; living radar. Outcome-feedback sharpens gap-reverse-filter so never pitches a closed gap = compounding lead.
layers.reuse: Reuses harvester on Contabo cron. Outcome loop plugs into agentmemory lessons (confidence + 5%/day decay). $0.

layers.name: Self-Improvement Eval + Memory Loop
layers.what: Closed feedback loop across fleet: trace every agent run, score outcomes (reply rate, deal close, build quality), feed wins/losses back as evals+lessons so 40+ agents AND prospecting heuristics improve autonomously. Learns best-converting gaps/verticals in Cuiaba.
layers.value: Stated constraint is 24/7 self-improving. Without traces+evals cant debug/improve; with them whole ecosystem compounds.
layers.reuse: AgentMemory exists (lessons+insights+consolidate/reflect cron); hermes-skill-forge-runner does dry-run->metrics->promote/quarantine. Wire fleet outcomes in.

layers.name: Cost / Resource Governance (FinOps for $0-first Contabo)
layers.what: Track token/compute/storage spend per agent, per client, per stage; rate-limit + fallback to cheaper/local models; budget caps with alerts.
layers.value: Hard constraint is $0-first. Without per-agent cost visibility a 40+ agent 24/7 fleet silently blows budget; FinOps makes leading the market financially survivable solo.
layers.reuse: AgentMemory already self-hosted (Ollama local near-zero marginal cost). Add usage/cost meter + gateway routing.

layers.name: AI-Search Visibility Audit
layers.what: Per-business test whether ChatGPT/Perplexity/Gemini recommend them for category+city; score AI-search invisibility. Result IS a gap-report section AND a standalone offer.
layers.value: 88% local businesses no AI-search strategy, only 1.2% AI-recommended, yet 45% consumers use AI to find local services (was 6%). Massive fresh fear-inducing gap-reverse market.
layers.reuse: Feeds Gap Report engine directly. Cheap to run, high-emotion pitch.

layers.name: Public Conquest / Leaderboard (inbound magnet)
layers.what: Public-facing 'agentic Cuiaba' tracker: how many businesses now 24/7 agentic, by niche, anonymized before/after. Positions Caio/Geronimo as obvious market leader.
layers.value: Authority pulls inbound (cheaper than outbound) and cements lead-Brazil narrative publicly. Self-reinforcing as conquest % grows.
layers.reuse: Reads from Penetration/Whitespace Conquest Map. Vuecra builds the page.

layers.name: Case-Study Auto-Generator
layers.what: On each retained win auto-draft before/after case study from ROI proof layer (with consent) for outreach + public tracker.
layers.value: Social proof is #1 conversion lever for SMB; auto-gen removes the bottleneck that kills most solo case-study pipelines.
layers.reuse: Reads from Client ROI Proof Layer. Mostly templating (local Ollama).

layers.name: Command Center / Mission Control (goal-oriented)
layers.what: Single pane above Hermes+Geronimo+Vuecra. Manage by GOALS not terminals: Kanban of every prospect/deal/build/campaign as cards (queued/running/completed/needs-attention), live 40+ agent fleet status, exception surfacing, reprioritize without code, cron/event/webhook scheduling.
layers.value: THE single highest-leverage build. Solo founder cant run 40+ agents across 3 systems by reading logs. Goal-based mission control lets one person operate at fleet scale = the agency OS.
layers.reuse: Hermes has dashboard+daemon+WS broadcast (F.2.3 dot-notation, F.2.4 design system). Extend prospecting view to whole-agency view.

layers.name: Live Coverage Map UI (choropleth hex + funnel pins + HUD)
layers.what: Single MapLibre/Leaflet view: H3 hex choropleth by coverage state UNDER pin layer by funnel stage. Zoom aggregates country->state->city->hex->business. HUD: coverage %, found, % agentic, frontier size. Layer toggles.
layers.value: Exact map of found/swept/unexplored Caio asked for. Makes a 24/7 autonomous sweep legible and motivating at a glance.
layers.reuse: MapLibre+deck.gl H3HexagonLayer + OSM tiles, $0. Rides existing dashboard. Needs Territory Coverage Engine behind it for full value.

layers.name: Conquest Feed & Coverage Leaderboard
layers.what: Gamified activity stream + stats: 'Cuiaba Centro 100% swept', '+47 businesses found', 'state coverage 12%->14% this week', fastest-converting segments.
layers.value: Keeps solo founder oriented and 40+ fleet accountable; turns abstract 24/7 progress into visible momentum reinforcing lead-the-market narrative.
layers.reuse: Reads from coverage state + lifecycle CRM. Re-points SPOTIO/SalesRabbit leaderboard pattern to agents/territories.

layers.name: Guardrails / Human-in-the-Loop Approval Gate
layers.what: Policy-as-code gate before irreversible/destructive actions (mass outreach, publishing client site, spending, touching client account): low-conf or destructive requires confirm, rest autonomous. Audit log of every decision.
layers.value: Lets ONE founder safely delegate to 40+ autonomous agents touching real client businesses without blowing up a relationship = trust foundation for scaling delegation.
layers.reuse: Already designed in Hermes Brain (brain/safety.py: destructive 100% requires_confirm, low_conf<0.5->confirm) + brain-test golden cases. Generalize gate across Geronimo/Vuecra.

top_quick_wins: Signal-to-SKU Router + Productized Offer Ladder / Auto-Proposal
top_big_bets: External Signal Harvester + Per-Process Automatability Map
Living Scored Database + Continuous Re-Score / Self-Improvement Loop
emerging_future: Public Conquest / Authority Tracker + Case-Study Auto-Gen
Full signal-stack expansion (Hiring-Surge, New-Location, Ad-Activity, Competitor-FOMO)

filter_questions: Pick the bottleneck: not finding / not converting / not delivering-retaining / cant-see-steer? Selects the stage.
Spine first (Gap Report end-to-end on few verticals) or breadth first (Territory+CNPJ+heatmap across Cuiaba)?
If only ONE big-bet this quarter: Command Center / Diagnosis engine / Territory Coverage? Cross out the other two.
Does the layer need data you dont yet collect? If yes its two builds (collector+consumer). Prefer pure-logic-over-existing-data first.
What single metric must this workflow move: conquest % / sell-queue size / reply rate / retained-agentic-count?
Manual-acceptable vs must-be-autonomous per step? Autonomy is where effort explodes.
Reuse test: name the existing Hermes asset each survivor extends. Cant name one = its FUTURE not next.
Demo or proof? If closing bottleneck is believability prioritize Gap Report + AI-Search Audit; else find/diagnose more.
